global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a prominent headline and a call to action.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to book their next trip with flexible options.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Abstract shapes
elements.description: This element features a combination of abstract shapes, including an oval and a square, rendered in a light gray color.

elements.label: Small circles
elements.description: This element consists of two small circles, positioned vertically, with a simple outline and no fill.

elements.label: Medium rectangle
elements.description: This element is a medium-sized rectangle with a blank interior, outlined in a light gray color.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: This element displays bold, black text that reads 'Book your next trip', set against a white background.
elements.text_content: Book your next trip Flexible booking options

elements.label: Advertiser logo
elements.description: This element features the logo 'HorizonHop' in a bold font, positioned at the top of the ad in black against a white background.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: This element is a rounded button with the text 'Shop now' in white, set against a black background.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, the headline is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
